name: InterDigital, Inc.
business: InterDigital is a global research and development company focused primarily on wireless, video, artificial intelligence (AI), and related technologies. It licenses its innovations worldwide to companies providing such products and services, including makers of wireless communications devices, consumer electronics, IoT devices, cars and other motor vehicles and providers of cloud-based services such as video streaming.
sellsTo: providers of cloud-based services such as video streaming
namedCustomers: Guangdong OPPO Mobile Telecommunications Corp., Ltd.

exposures.sentence: As a leader in wireless technology, our engineers have designed and developed a wide range of innovations that are used in wireless products and networks, from the earliest digital cellular systems to 5G and today's most advanced Wi-Fi technologies.
We are also a leader in video processing and video encoding/decoding technology used in video-enabled products and services.
Our AI research effort is focused on the intersection of AI with both wireless and video technologies.

We license our innovations worldwide to companies providing such products and services, including makers of wireless communications devices, consumer electronics, internet of things ("IoT") devices, cars and other motor vehicles and providers of cloud-based services such as video streaming.

Our patented inventions have been implemented in a wide variety of products, including smartphones, tablets, base stations, televisions, laptops, gaming consoles, set-top boxes, streaming devices, connected automobiles, and other consumer electronics and IoT products.

catalysts.event: New patent license agreement signed with LG Electronics
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, we signed a new patent license agreement with LG Electronics.

catalysts.event: Renewal of patent license with Xiaomi
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, we renewed a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty bearing license with Xiaomi.
In December 2025, certain holders elected to convert $80.0 million of principal, which will settle in first quarter 2026.
The Company anticipates that the arbitration hearing will occur before year end.

tamClaims.claim: Smartphone market: 1.2 billion units shipped worldwide in 2025
tamClaims.sentence: The smartphone market, with an estimated 1.2 billion units shipped worldwide in 2025, is driven by several large, global brands.

tamClaims.claim: Television market: more than 200 million units shipped globally
tamClaims.sentence: After smartphones, televisions represent one of the largest markets with more than 200 million units shipped globally.

tamClaims.claim: Global cellular IoT device shipments: from 550 million in 2025 to 800 million by 2029
tamClaims.sentence: Total global cellular IoT device shipments are expected to grow from approximately 550 million in 2025 to approximately 800 million by 2029.

tamClaims.claim: Connected passenger vehicles shipped: 65 million in 2025
tamClaims.sentence: Automobiles represent a significant opportunity within the IoT market, with approximately 65 million connected passenger vehicles shipped in 2025, which is expected to grow significantly in the future.

tamClaims.claim: Video Services market: from $475 billion in 2025 to $675 billion by 2029
tamClaims.sentence: Collectively, the Video Services market is expected to grow from approximately $475 billion of annual revenue in 2025 to approximately $675 billion of annual revenue by 2029.
